case_title: MOSSER, NEVEO vs. KAY, SY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAY, SY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 455 EDDY #E-1610 $500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-11-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS. PLTF TO KEEP SECURITY DEPOSIT. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KAY, SY
PHOTOCOPY FOR 6 COPIES FOR CASE NUMBER 125880. PLTF COPIES. FOR PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO COURT TRIAL SET FOR JAN-10-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO AS TO DEFENDANT KAY, SY DOES 1 TO 4 SUMMONS ISSUED

#1 BENSON/BAUER: C/C FOR CT TRIAL. PLTF & DEFT S KAY PRESENT IN PRO PER. SETTLED. TERMS NOT ON RECORD. BOTH PARTIES UNDERSTAND & AGREE TO TERMS. JDMT BY STIP FOR PLTF AGAINST DEFT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
